description: This file defines a Spring Boot EnvironmentPostProcessor that sets the 'spring.datasource.url' property based on Neon-style environment variables ('DATABASE_URL' or 'NEON_DATABASE_URL'). It converts URI formats into JDBC URLs and ensures the data source configuration is correctly established early in the application startup process.

classes.name: NeonDatasourceEnvironmentPostProcessor
classes.description: Implements an EnvironmentPostProcessor to set the datasource URL from Neon environment variables, converting URI formats into JDBC URLs, and runs with high precedence to ensure early configuration.

methods.name: postProcessEnvironment
methods.description: Checks if 'spring.datasource.url' is set; if not, retrieves environment variables, normalizes URI to JDBC URL, and injects the property.

methods.name: getOrder
methods.description: Returns an integer indicating the order in which this processor should run; set to highest precedence.

methods.name: firstNonBlank
methods.description: Returns the first non-blank string among given values.

methods.name: normalizeToJdbcPostgres
methods.description: Converts a PostgreSQL URI to a JDBC URL, supporting embedded user info, ports, paths, queries, and encoding.

methods.name: urlEncode
methods.description: Encodes strings into URL-safe format for query parameters.
